title: German Fruit Pudding
description: A classic German dessert made with sweet and ripe fruit.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine sliced strawberries and granulated sugar (if using). Let sit for 15 minutes.
In a separate bowl, whip heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
In a separate bowl, mix vanilla pudding according to package instructions.
Fold whipped cream into pudding until well combined.
Spoon pudding mixture over sliced strawberries.
Sprinkle crushed german cookies over pudding mixture.
Zest lemon over pudding mixture (if using).
Drizzle lemon juice over pudding mixture (if using).
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
